title.en: Therefore, the immortal black gold is also a pr...

content.en:
The Immortal Black Gold Vein is not an ordinary vein, but a vein that can create a forbidden weapon, although it is not as good as the Dark Blunt Gold Vein that Ye Tian obtained before, but the value is also incomparably huge.

Even if Immortal Black Gold is used alone, it can create a medium forbidden weapon, and if you use enough Immortal Black Gold and have a high level of refining, you can also create a high forbidden weapon.

The most important thing is that the indestructible black gold has an indestructible nature, even if the weapon is interrupted, it can be recovered, while once other forbidden weapons are interrupted, it is really broken, and the price to pay for repairing it is very high.

Even Ye Tian's Heaven Slaying Spear, if it was interrupted by other top-level forbidden weapons, it would be difficult to repair, but if it added Immortal Black Gold, it would be equivalent to being able to repair it automatically, and its value would increase a lot in an instant.

Therefore, the immortal black gold is also a precious treasure for Ye Tian.

Without saying a word, Ye Tian instantly joined the battle and competed with the invincible Dao Ancestors for the indestructible black gold.

I saw Ye Tian stealth, approaching an indestructible black gold nugget that flew out, grabbed it at once, and immediately entered the inner world.

In this way, Ye Tian used the forbidden talent to hide and stealth, and other invincible Dao Ancestors could not perceive Ye Tian's existence at all, and often a piece of immortal black gold not far in front of him had not yet been snatched by anyone, and when he was about to snatch it, he was instantly taken away by Ye Tian.

"Dark King, you've gone too far!"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor said angrily.

After all, everyone else is serious about snatching the indestructible black gold, relying on their own strength, they can snatch more indestructible black gold if they are strong, but Ye Tian is good, he directly stealth and snatches it, it is simply too scoundrel.

Of course, they are more jealous.

It would be nice if they had this ability, and they would be able to snatch more Immortal Black Gold.

Ye Tianke didn't care about the roar and anger of the Peerless Dao Ancestors and other invincible Dao Ancestors, he still happily snatched the Immortal Black Gold, and soon snatched a lot of Immortal Black Gold.

But it didn't take long for all the veins of indestructible black gold to be robbed, leaving only a huge pit.

Subsequently, the Invincible Dao Ancestors left one by one to find other rare veins.

As time passed, the veins were excavated by the Dao Ancestors, and the veins in the world of gold became fewer and fewer.

Suddenly.

A breath was transmitted, causing all the Dao Ancestors in the Earth World to tremble, and their eyes couldn't help but look at a certain place in the Golden World.

There was no danger in this aura, but it contained an incomparably mysterious forbidden avenue, which immersed their minds in it, and many insights emerged one by one.

"Great chance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Suddenly, one by one, the invincible Dao Ancestor and the Supreme Dao Ancestor all shuttled towards that position.

In the Golden World, in the middle of a shattered mountain, an ancient black statue stands.

It is a statue of an ape, holding a spear, standing like a human.

The Half-Step Domain Ancestors such as the Blue Dragon Palace Lord and the Eternal Dao Ancestor were all here, staring at this ape statue one by one.

They had snatched a top-level forbidden treasure here, but as a result, the mountain peaks exploded, and this ape statue appeared.

And that top-level forbidden treasure was snatched away by the Qinglong Palace Lord, but at this moment, everyone had automatically forgotten about the top-level treasure, and they were all staring at this ape statue.

"What is this statue made of, it gives me a dangerous aura!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was surprised.

"It should be the Eternal Source Stone!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said in a low voice.

Eternal Source Stone!

This is a very ancient name, so far away that the ancestors of the half-step domain don't know much about it.

It is rumored that the Eternal Source Stone was born in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it is the most primitive power stone, but even the Domain Ancestor cannot absorb the energy of the Eternal Source Stone.

In the historical records of the Divine Heaven Realm, there was a thumb-sized Eternal Source Stone, which caused many domain ancestors to fight, but in the end, the domain ancestors had no choice but to do anything about this Eternal Source Stone, and they didn't know how to use the Eternal Source Stone.

Eventually, the Eternal Source Stone was no longer available.

But I have to say that even if it is used for collection, the value of the Eternal Source Stone is far beyond the imagination of the half-step domain ancestor.

And there is such a large Eternal Source Stone statue here, which is simply amazing.

It's a pity that they tried it, but they couldn't take this Eternal Source Stone statue at all, as if it was connected to the world of gold.

"This Eternal Source Stone Statue was definitely not born naturally in the Golden World, it must have been obtained by this forbidden creature from somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and then placed it in its own Golden World, and used the Golden World to completely bind the Eternal Source Stone Statue!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor guessed.

"It should be!"

The other half-step domain ancestors nodded.

Although they couldn't take the Eternal Source Stone Statue, they didn't leave here, but closed their eyes one by one and began to comprehend and cultivate here.

This statue is not just a simple Eternal Source Stone, it seems to contain an incomparably powerful Forbidden Dao, and even the standing posture and spear movement of this Eternal Source Stone statue are full of endless mysteries.

Rumble!!!!

In the perception of the half-step domain ancestors, it seemed that the Eternal Source Stone statue in front of them was no longer a statue, but turned into an incomparably terrifying giant ape, standing in the Dark Forbidden Void, a roar shook hundreds of millions of Dark Forbidden Voids, and killed countless forbidden creatures with a single spear.

It, above the forbidden creatures, is an existence that the half-step domain ancestors can't imagine.

Puff puff puff!!

A half-step domain ancestor vomited blood, and their expressions changed greatly.

"Retreat, you can't get close to Shenwu!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

Whoa!!

A half-step domain ancestor quickly exited the area, and then began to regain his enlightenment in the area a little farther away.

At this time, they felt that the pressure brought to them by this statue was much lessened, and no matter how they comprehended, there was nothing to do.

"The original owner of this statue is too powerful!"

The Qinglong Palace Lord and the others sighed.

They even speculated now that the reason for the fall of the forbidden creature of the Darkwing Roc Eagle might have something to do with this statue.

The Darkwing Roc Eagle seized the statue and tried to escape, but was severely injured by a being who was above the forbidden creature across the distant Dark Forbidden Territory, and finally fell to his death, and his body floated to the Dark Forbidden Realm near the Daoshan Realm.

If that were the case, the Eternal Source Stone statue would be too valuable.

"We must take a good look at it, maybe we can break through the realm with the Eternal Source Stone Statue and become a Domain Ancestor, or even go further on the path of the Domain Ancestor!" said the Eternal Dao Ancestor excitedly.

Whoa!!

The Strongest Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors also rushed here from afar, and they also saw the Eternal Source Stone Statue.
